source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_DIVISION AS 
( 
Select Date,Data_Source_type,Currency,Cost, CLicks, Impressions,Conversions, 
		Account, Ad, Ad_Group, Campaign, Media_type,Paid__Organic,Traffic_source,
		Data_Source_name,Data_Source, Data_source_type_name,
		Day_of_week, Month, week,Year,Week_number,
		CampaignId,AdGroupId,AdID,
		Case when (Data_source_name like '%Closet%' Or Data_source_name='187673395') then case when Campaign like '%Coat%' then 'CTA-GS' else 'CTA' end
				when (Data_source_name like '%FHIA%'   or  Data_source_name like '%East%' or  Data_source_name like '%Florida%')  then 'FHI'
				when  Data_source_name like '%Mad City%' or  Data_source_name like '%Central%' or Data_source_name='IHM | WIT | WalkinTubs.com' then 'MAC'
				when  Data_source_name like '%Max%' then case when Campaign like '%SWR%' then 'SWR' else 'FHI' end 
				when  Data_source_name like '%Statewide%' then 'SWR'
				when (Data_source_name like '%Rite%' or Data_source_name like '%Home Smart%' or Data_source_name like '%NorthEast%' or Data_source_name like '%North East%') then 'RTW'
				when (Data_source_name like '%Pacific%' or  Data_source_name like '%West%' Or Data_source_Name='Walk-in Bath Swish' or Data_source_name like '%Home Forever Bath%' )  then 'PBC'
				when  Data_source_name like '%Coating%'  then 'CTA-GS'
				when  Data_Source_name like '%Ren%' then Coalesce(Case When (Campaign like '%Garage%' or Campaign like '%Coat%' or Campaign like '%Storage%') then 'CTA-GS'
																	   When (Campaign like '%Closet%' or Campaign like '%PHI%' or Campaign like '%ca-%' or Campaign like '%Home Org%') then 'CTA'
																	   when (Campaign like '%FHI%' or Campaign like '%East%' ) then 'FHI'
																	   When (Campaign like '%PBC%' or Campaign like '%pacific%' or Campaign like '%West%' or Campaign like 'PB %' or Campaign like 'RH %' ) then 'PBC'
																	   When (Campaign like '%SWR%' or Campaign like '%Statewide%') then 'SWR'
																	   When (Campaign like '%RTW%' or Campaign like '%Rite Window%' or Campaign like '%RiteWindow%' or Campaign like '%HSI%' or Campaign like '%NorthEast%' OR  Campaign like '%North East%' )  then 'RTW'
																	   When (Campaign like '%MAC%' or Campaign like '%MCW%' or Campaign like '%Central%' or Campaign like '%MadCity%' or Campaign like '%Mad City%' or Campaign like '%Mad_City%') then 'MAC'
																	   When (Campaign like '%MXH%' or Campaign like '%MAX%') then 'FHI'  end, 'REN') 
			end  as Division,
		Replace(Replace(Market,',',''),'.','') as Market  
from ODS.FUNNEL_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS
Where Campaign is not null  --and Traffic_source in ('Bing','Google','Facebook')  and Eomonth(Date)>='2024-01-31'

),

FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_LPMARKET AS 
(
Select	Date,Data_Source_type,Currency,cast(Cost as Float(5)) as Cost, CLicks, Impressions,Conversions, 
		A.Account, Ad, Ad_Group, Campaign, Media_type,Paid__Organic,Traffic_source,
		Data_Source_name,Data_Source, Data_source_type_name,
		Day_of_week, Month, week,Year,Week_number,
		CampaignId,AdGroupId,AdID,
		Case when A.Division='CTA-GS' then 'CTA' else A.Division end AS Division ,
		A.Division as Division_GS,
		A.Market,B.DMAREGION,
		COALESCE(B.LP_Market,C.LP_Market,'zNo Market') as LP_Market
		--ISNULL(B.LP_Market , 'zNo Market' ) as LP_Market
		From 
			
		FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_DIVISION A
			
		Left join  RDM.REF_FUNNEL_AD_MARKET B 
		on  A.Traffic_source=B.TrafficSource and A.Division=B.Division and A.Account=B.Account and A.Market = B.DMAREGION 
		
		Left join  RDM.REF_FUNNEL_AD_MARKET C
		on  A.Traffic_source=C.TrafficSource and A.Division=C.Division and A.Account=C.Account and A.Market = C.ComscoreMarket 

WHERE A.Traffic_source in ('Bing','Google','Facebook','Pinterest','The Trade Desk') 

),

REF_MARKET AS 
(
Select Division, BranchID, ShortName, MediumName,BranchName, 
case when (BranchID like  Division +'-GS' +'%' ) then BranchName else UNI_market end as Market
from EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN
Where UNI_Market!='zNo Market' and  ShortName<>'For Budget'  and ShortName not in ('For GQ','For EBITDA')
AND	 Division_MKTG!='G.Pacific Gutter'
)
,

FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_LPBRANCH AS 
(
Select 
	 Date,Data_Source_type,Currency,Cost,Clicks,Impressions,Conversions,Account,Ad,Ad_Group,
	 Campaign,Media_type,Paid__Organic,Traffic_source,
	 Data_Source_name,Data_Source,Data_Source_type_name,Day_of_week,Month,Week,Year,Week_number,
	 CampaignID, AdGroupID, AdID, T1.Division,T1.Market, LP_Market, 
	 max( Case when T1.Division='CTA' then
								case when T1.Division_GS='CTA-GS' then ISNULL(T2.BranchID,'CTA-GS') 
									 else ISNULL(T2.BranchID,'CTA-') end 
				else COALESCE(T2.BranchID,Concat(T1.Division,'-')) end ) as BranchID
	 from 
	 
	 FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_LPMARKET T1 Left Join  REF_MARKET T2  On T1.Division=T2.Division and T1.LP_Market=T2.Market
	
	
 

	 Group by Date,Data_Source_type,Currency,Cost,Clicks,Impressions,Account,Ad,Ad_Group,
			   Campaign,Media_type,Paid__Organic,Traffic_source,
			   Data_Source_name,Data_Source,Data_Source_type_name,Day_of_week,Month,Week,Year,Week_number,
			   conversions, CampaignID, AdGroupID, AdID, T1.Division,T1.Market, LP_Market



)


--Select Distinct Traffic_Source,Division,Account, Data_source_Name, Market, LP_market, BranchID from ( 

SELECT
Date
,Data_Source_type
,Currency
,Cost
,Clicks
,Impressions
,Account
,Ad
,Ad_Group
,Campaign
,Media_type
,Paid__Organic
,Traffic_source
,Data_Source_name
,Data_Source
,Data_Source_type_name
,Day_of_week
,Month
,Week
,Year
,Cast(Week_number as Int)  as Week_number
,Conversions
,CampaignID
,AdGroupID
,AdID
,Division
,Market
,BranchID
,LP_Market 
,Getdate() as CreatedTS
,Getdate() as LastUpdateTS
FROM 
(
	SELECT *,
	ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Date,Data_Source_type,Currency,Cost,Clicks,Impressions,Account,Ad,Ad_Group,
	Campaign,Media_type,Paid__Organic,Traffic_source
	,Data_Source_name,Data_Source_type_name,Day_of_week,Month,Week,Year,Cast(Week_number as Int),
	Conversions,CampaignID,AdGroupID,AdID,Division,Market,LP_Market,BranchID
	ORDER BY Data_Source ) AS RW
	FROM 
	(
	Select * from FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_LPBRANCH
	
	Union All 
	
	Select Date,Data_Source_type,Currency,Cost,Clicks,Impressions,Conversions,
		Account,Ad,Ad_Group,Campaign,Media_type,Paid__Organic,Traffic_source,
		Data_Source_name,Data_Source,Data_Source_type_name,
		Day_of_week,Month,Week,Year,Week_number,
		CampaignID,AdGroupID,AdID,
		Case when Division='CTA-GS' then 'CTA' else Division end AS Division,Market, NULL as LP_MarketID, NULL as BranchID from FUNNEL_CAMPAIGNS_WITH_DIVISION 
		where Traffic_source not in ('Google' ,'Facebook','Bing','Pinterest','The Trade Desk')
	
	) A1
) A

WHERE RW=1  
--)A2 where LP_market not like '%Zno Market%' Order by 1,2,4,3,5

sink.preCopyScript:
DELETE  T1
FROM EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS T1
JOIN 
	(
		SELECT TRAFFICSOURCE,PERFORMANCEDATE,DATASOURCENAME FROM 
		
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT TRAFFICSOURCE, DATASOURCENAME, EOMONTH(PERFORMANCEDATE) AS PERFORMANCEDATE FROM EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS 
			) F
		JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT TRAFFIC_SOURCE ,DATA_SOURCE_NAME ,EOMONTH(DATE) DATE FROM ODS.FUNNEL_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS WHERE TRAFFIC_SOURCE IS NOT NULL
			) O 
		
		ON 	F.TRAFFICSOURCE		= O.TRAFFIC_SOURCE 
		AND F.PERFORMANCEDATE 	= O.DATE
		AND F.DATASOURCENAME	= O.DATA_SOURCE_NAME
		
	)T2  
	
	ON 	T1.TRAFFICSOURCE			=	T2.TRAFFICSOURCE 
	AND EOMONTH(T1.PERFORMANCEDATE) =	T2.PERFORMANCEDATE
	AND T1.DATASOURCENAME			= 	T2.DATASOURCENAME

activities.name: Update BranchID
activities.description: Update Branch ID for all Traffic Sources except Google

scripts.text:
WITH UNI_MARKET AS 
(	

SELECT Distinct Case when BranchId like 'CTA-GS%' then 'CTA-GS' else Division end Division,BranchID, Value as BranchName	FROM 
( 
	Select Distinct BE.Division,BE.BranchID,
			Cast(BranchName as varchar(256)) As BranchName,
			Cast(BE.UNI_Market as varchar(256)) UNI_Market,
			Cast(BE.UNI_MarketGroup as varchar(256)) UNI_MarketGroup,
			Cast(BE.UNI_marketRegion as varchar(256)) UNI_marketRegion,
			Cast(LTRIM(RTRIM(SUBSTRING(
						  ACU_market, 
						  PATINDEX('%[A-Za-z]%', ACU_market),                
						  Case when ACU_Market like '%,%' then CHARINDEX(',', ACU_market)-PATINDEX('%[A-Za-z]%', ACU_market) else Len(ACU_Market) end  
								))) as varchar(256)) as ACU_Market
	from EDW_DUN.DIM_BRANCH_EXTN BE Left Join EDW.DIM_Branch B on BE.BranchId=B.BranchId
	Where BE.UNI_Market!='zNo Market' and  BE.ShortName<>'For Budget'  and BE.ShortName not in ('For GQ','For EBITDA')  
		AND BE.BranchName != '2' and BE.Division not in ('HSI','PHI','MXH') and B.Active=1
) P	UNPIVOT  ( Value FOR Attribute IN (BranchName, UNI_Market,UNI_MarketGroup, UNI_marketRegion, ACU_Market
										) 
			)AS unpvt
			
)

,Funnel_Campaigns AS (
Select Distinct TrafficSource,
	Case When  Datasourcename like '%Coat%' or 
			(Campaign like '%Garage%' or Campaign like '%Coat%' or Campaign like '%Storage%') then 'CTA-GS' else Division end Division,
	DatasourceName,Campaign,LP_BranchID from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS
Where TrafficSource in ('Outbrain','Taboola')  and Eomonth(Performancedate) >= Dateadd(M,-24,Getdate())
)

,Update_Final AS (
Select TrafficSource,DataSourceName,Division,Campaign,BranchId,Native_BranchId 
from (
	Select Distinct TrafficSource,DataSourceName,
		case when F.Division like 'CTA-GS' then 'CTA' else F.Division end as Division, Campaign,
		Case when (F.Campaign like '%Markets%' or F.Campaign like '%all%')
					then case when F.Division='CTA-GS' then 'CTA-GS' else Concat(F.Division,'-') end 
					else M.BranchId end BranchId, 
		B.BranchId as Native_BranchID,
		M.BranchName,Row_number() over(partition by TrafficSource,DatasourceName,F.Division,F.Campaign order by Coalesce(M.BranchId,B.BranchId) ) as Rn
	from 
	Funnel_Campaigns F 
	Left Join  UNI_Market M on F.Division=M.Division and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','')  like '%' + Replace(M.BranchName,' ','') +'%'
	Left join EDW.DIM_Branch B on F.Division=Case when B.BranchId like 'CTA-GS%' then 'CTA-GS' Else 'CTA' End 
			and F.TrafficSource in ('Taboola','Outbrain') and B.Division ='CTA' and F.Campaign like '%' + replace(B.ShortName,'GS','') + '%' --Temporary for native
	)a    
where Rn=1

)
	
Update EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS set LP_BranchID = ISNULL(t2.BranchId,Concat(t1.Division,'-')) from 
EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS t1 Join 
(
	Select Distinct F.TrafficSource,F.Division,F.DatasourceName,F.campaign, Coalesce(A1.BranchId,A1.Native_BranchId) as BranchId
		from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F Left Join Update_Final A1 on
		F.TrafficSource=A1.TrafficSource and F.Division=A1.Division and F.DatasourceName=A1.DatasourceName and  F.Campaign=A1.Campaign 
		Where F.TrafficSource in ('Outbrain','Taboola') and Eomonth(F.Performancedate) >= Dateadd(M,-24,Getdate())
		
	) t2 on t1.TrafficSource=t2.TrafficSource and t1.Division=t2.Division and t1.DatasourceName=t2.DatasourceName  and t1.Campaign=t2.Campaign --638
	Where T1.TrafficSource in ('Outbrain','Taboola') and Eomonth(T1.PerformanceDate) >= Dateadd(M,-24,Getdate())
--Order by 1,3,2,4
;

activities.name: Update Subsource
activities.description: Update LeadsubsourceId for Google Traffic Sources campaigns

scripts.text:
With LP_SubSource as 
(

Select Case when TX_sourceCode in ('Paid Social') then 'Facebook' 
			when TX_sourceCode='Native' then 'Native'
			when TX_sourceCode='Programmatic' then 'The Trade Desk'
			else case when SubSourceType like '%Bing%' then 'Bing' else 'Google' end
			end as TrafficSource,
	   Division, LeadSubSourceID, SubsourceType, LeadSubSource, EntryDate
from 
	(
		Select *, Dense_rank() over(partition by Division,TX_SourceCode,SubsourceType Order by EntryDate desc,LP_LeadSubsourceId desc) as Rownum From 
			(
				Select Distinct SS.Division,SS.LeadSubsourceId,SS.LP_LeadSubsourceId,sg.SourceGroup,SS.SOurceCode, SS.LeadSubsource,
					   Case When M.TX_SourceCode in ('Paid Search','YouTube') then				   
					   			Case when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Keyword%' then 'Keyword Connect' 
									 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Coat%' and SS.LeadSubsource not like '%Bing%'  then 'Coating'
					   				 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Bing%' and SS.LeadSubsource like '%Coat%' then 'Bing Coatings'
					   				 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%bing%' then 'Bing'
									 when M.LeadSubsource like '%YouTube%' and  SS.LeadSubsource like '%YouTube%'  then 'YouTube'
					   				 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Performance%' or SS.Leadsubsource like '%Pmax%' then 'Performance Max'
					   				 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%LSA%' or SS.LeadSubsource like  '%Local%' then 'LSA'
					   				 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Display%'  then 'Display'
									 when (SS.Leadsubsource like '%Google%' or SS.Leadsubsource like '%PPC%' or M.Leadsubsource like '%Adwords%' or SS.Leadsubsource like  '%Website%' or SS.Leadsubsource like '%Search%' or SS.Leadsubsource like '%SEM%' )
										and ( SS.LeadSubsource not like '%Google LSA%' and SS.LeadSubsource not like '%Google Local%' and SS.LeadSubsource not like '%SEM Bing%') then 'SEM' 
					   				 	end  
							When M.TX_SourceCOde ='Paid Social' then
					   			Case when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Swish%' and  SS.LeadSubsource like '%Coat%' then 'Coating-Swish'
									 when SS.LeadSubsource like '%Swish%' and  SS.LeadSubsource not like '%Coat%' then 'Swish'
					   				 when SS.LeadSubsource like 'Meta - Coatings%' then 'Coating'
									 when SS.Leadsubsource like '%Meta%' or SS.LeadSubsource like '%Facebook%' then 'Meta' 
						   -- When M.TX_SourceCOde ='Branded Partner' then -- Temporaily added BP since Guru srs ids are under BP
					   				 when ( SS.LeadSubsource like '%Guru Digital%' or SS.LeadSubsource like '%Lead Guru%' ) and  Replace(SS.LeadSubsource,' ','') not like '%HomeGuru%' then 'Guru' end
							When M.TX_SourceCOde ='Native' then
					   			Case when SS.Leadsubsource like '%Coat%' then 'Coating'
									 when ( SS.LeadSubsource like '%Native%' OR  UPPER(SS.LeadSubsource) like '%NEXTDOOR%' or SS.LeadSubsource like '%Taboola%' or SS.LeadSubsource like '%Outbrain%') then 'Native' 
									 when SS.Leadsubsource like '%Pinterest%' then 'Pinterest' end
							When M.TX_SourceCOde ='Programmatic' then 'Programmatic' --added for TD source
					   End as SubsourceType,
					   M.EntryDate,M.SourceGroup as T_sourceGroup,M.SourceCode as T_sourceCode,M.LeadSubsource as T_leadSubsource, 
					   M.TX_channel, M.TX_sourceGroup, M.TX_SourceCode
				from EDW.DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE SS
					left join EDW.dim_lead_source s on s.leadsourceid=ss.leadsourceid
					left join EDW.dim_lead_source_group sg on s.sourcegroupid=sg.leadsourcegroupid 
					Left Join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_SOURCE_MAPPING M on SS.LeadSUbsourceID=M.LeadSubSourceID
				where Year(M.EntryDate)<=Year(Getdate())  and M.TX_sourceGroup in ('Performance') 
				and M.TX_sourceCode in ('Paid Search','YouTube','Paid Social','Native','Programmatic') 
				) A
	) B where Rownum=1



)
,
Final_updates As 
(
Select TrafficSource,Division,DatasourceName,PerformanceDate, CampaignType,Campaign,Case when Division='REN' and LeadSubsourceId is null then 'REN-' else LeadSubSourceId end LeadSubSourceID,
LeadSubSource,SubsourceType,Rownum from 
(
	Select F.* , L.LeadSubSourceID, L.LeadSubSource,L.SubsourceType, 
	Row_number() over(partition by F.TrafficSource,F.Division,F.DataSourceName,F.PerformanceDate, F.Campaign Order by L.EntryDate desc) as Rownum from 
		(	 
		Select Distinct TrafficSource, Case when TrafficSource in ('Taboola','Outbrain','Pinterest','Nextdoor') then 'Native' else TrafficSource end as TrafficSource_Combined,Division,DatasourceName,
					Eomonth(Performancedate) as PerformanceDate,
					Campaign,
					Case when TrafficSource='Google' then
									Case when DatasourceName like '%Platinum%' then 'Keyword Connect' 
										when Campaign like '%Display%' then 'Display' 
										when Campaign like '%Performance%' or Campaign like '%Pmax%' then 'Performance Max' 
										when Campaign like '%LocalServices%' then 'LSA' 
										when Campaign like '%YOUTUBE%' or Campaign like '%YT %' then 'YouTube'
										-- when Campaign like '%Coat%' or Campaign like '%Storage%' or Campaign like '%garage%' then 'Coating'
										Else 'SEM' end 
						when TrafficSource='Facebook' then 
								Case when DatasourceName in ('Statewide Bath - Swish' ,'Statewide Windows - Swish' ,'FHIA Windows - Swish') and Eomonth(PerformanceDate) between '2025-10-31' and '2025-12-31' 
										then 'Meta'
									else 
										Case when DatasourceName like '%Guru%' then 'Guru'
											when DatasourceName like '%Swish%'  then 'Swish'
											--when DatasourceName like '%Coat%' and DatasourceName like '%Swish%' then 'Coating-Swish'
											--when DatasourceName like '%Coat%' then 'Coating'
											--when DataSourceName like '%Closet%' then case when Campaign like '%Coat%' then 'Coating' else 'Meta' end
											else 'Meta' end
									end
						when TrafficSource='Outbrain' then 'Coating' 
						when TrafficSource='Pinterest' then 'Pinterest'
						when TrafficSource='The Trade Desk' then 'Programmatic'
						when TrafficSource='Taboola' then Case when (Campaign like '%Coat%' or Campaign like '%storage%' or Campaign like '%Garage%') then 'Coating' else 'Native' end
						when TrafficSource='Bing' and (Campaign not like '%Coat%' and Campaign not like '%storage%') then 'Bing' 
						when TrafficSource='Nextdoor'  then 'Native' 
						else 'Bing Coatings'
					end As CampaignType
				from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F 
				--Left join EDW.DIM_Facebook_campaign C on F.TrafficSource='Facebook' and F.Account=C.AccountId and F.CampaignID=C.CampaignId
				
		--where Eomonth(Performancedate) >= Dateadd(M,-24,Getdate())
		)F 
			 
		Left Join LP_SubSource L 
		on F.TrafficSource_Combined=L.TrafficSource and F.Division=L.Division and F.CampaignType=L.SubsourceType 
		

) A where Rownum=1  

)

--select Distinct t1.TrafficSource,t1.DatasourceName,Eomonth(t1.PerformanceDate) as PerformanceDate, t1.Division, t1.Campaign, t2.LeadsubsourceId
Update EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS set LP_LeadSubSOurceID = t2.LeadSubSourceID
From EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS t1 join 
(
Select Distinct F.TrafficSource,F.DatasourceName,Eomonth(F.PerformanceDate) as PerformanceDate, F.Division, F.Campaign,A1.LeadSubsourceID,A1.CampaignType,A1.SubsourceType--,M.LeadSubsource
	from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F  Join Final_updates A1 on
	A1.TrafficSource =F.TrafficSource and A1.Division=F.Division and A1.DatasourceName=F.DatasourceName and A1.PerformanceDate=Eomonth(F.PerformanceDate) and  A1.Campaign=F.Campaign 
	--Where Eomonth(F.Performancedate) >= Dateadd(M,-24,Getdate()) 
	--Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Sub_Source_mapping M on A1.LeadSubsourceId=M.LeadSubsourceId
	
) t2 on t1.TrafficSource=t2.TrafficSource and t1.Division=t2.Division and t1.DatasourceName=t2.DatasourceName and Eomonth(T1.PerformanceDate)= T2.PerformanceDate and t1.Campaign=t2.Campaign   
--Where Eomonth(t1.Performancedate) >= Dateadd(M,-24,Getdate())
;



--and  f.TrafficSource in ('The Trade Desk') -- and t1.DataSourceName='Statewide Windows - Swish'--and Eomonth(t1.Performancedate)='2025-10-31'
--Order by 1,2, 3 desc, 5

activities.name: Update Product
activities.description: Update Product ID for Google Traffic Sources campaigns

scripts.text:
With Product_Mapping as 
(
	SELECT Division,ProductID,EntryDate, Replace(case when Attribute ='TX_ProductGroup' then Substring(Value,1,4) else Value end,'wind','windows') as ProductName	FROM 
	   (
	   
		SELECT 
		Division,ProductID,EntryDate,ProductName,ProductDescription, TX_ProductGroup ,TX_product_Reporting
	    FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Product_mapping
	    where Division not in ('HSI','PHI','MXH') 
		and TX_product_reporting  is NOT NULL 
		and TX_Product_Reporting<>'Gutters' 
		and ( ProductName  is NOT NULL 
		and ProductDescription is NOT NULL) 
		and Year(EntryDate)<=Year(Getdate()) 
		and EntryDate is not null 
		and ACU_ProductID<>'000'
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		
		SELECT * FROM 
		(
		SELECT Division,ProductID,EntryDate,CASE WHEN ProductName LIKE '%WalkIn Tub%' THEN 'WIT' ELSE NULL END AS ProductName,ProductDescription, TX_ProductGroup ,TX_product_Reporting
				FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Product_mapping
				where ( ProductName  is NOT NULL and ProductDescription is NOT NULL) 
				AND Year(EntryDate)<=Year(Getdate()) 
				AND EntryDate IS NOT NULL 
				AND ACU_ProductID<>'000'
				AND Division='SWR'
				AND ProductName LIKE '%Walk%'
				) M1
		WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL
		
		
		
	   ) p 	UNPIVOT  ( Value FOR Attribute IN (ProductName, ProductDescription, TX_ProductGroup, TX_product_Reporting) )AS unpvt
),
Funnel_Campaigns as (
Select Distinct TrafficSource, F.Division, F.DataSourceName,F.Campaign,
	Replace(Replace(F.DatasourceName,'Coat','Garage'),'Storage','Garage') as DatasourceName_Upd, 
	Replace(Replace(F.Campaign,'Coat','Garage'),'Storage','Garage')  as Campaign_upd
from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F 
)
, Update_Final As (
Select Trafficsource, Division, DatasourceName,Campaign, ProductId, ProductReporting from (
	Select  * ,Row_number() over(Partition by TrafficSource,Division,DatasourceName,Campaign Order by EntryDate desc ,Cast(Rtrim(Substring(ProductId,5,Len(ProductId))) as Int) desc ) as Rownum 
	from (
			Select  TrafficSource, F.Division,F.DatasourceName, F.Campaign,
					  Case when  ( F.Division in ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI','MXH') )  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%'  
							then Concat(F.Division,'-') else Coalesce(P.ProductId,P1.ProductId) end as ProductID,
					  Case when  ( F.Division in  ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI','MXH') )  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%' 
							then 'zNo Product' else Coalesce(P.Productname,P1.Productname) end as ProductReporting,
					  Coalesce(p.Entrydate,P1.Entrydate) as EntryDate
			from 
			Funnel_Campaigns F 	
			Left Join Product_Mapping p on  F.Division=P.Division and  F.Campaign_Upd like '%' + P.ProductName  + '%'
			Left Join Product_Mapping p1 on  F.Division=P1.Division  and  F.DatasourceName_Upd like '%' + P1.ProductName  + '%'
		 ) A 
 ) B where Rownum=1
)

Update EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS set LP_ProductID = ISNULL(t2.ProductID,Concat(t1.Division,'-')) from 
EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS t1 Join 
(
	Select Distinct F.TrafficSource,F.Division,F.DatasourceName,F.campaign,A1.ProductId--,M.TX_product_Reporting
	from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F Join Update_Final A1 on
		A1.TrafficSource=F.TrafficSource and A1.Division=F.Division and A1.DatasourceName=F.DatasourceName and  A1.Campaign=F.Campaign 
		Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Product_mapping M on A1.ProductID=M.ProductId
	) t2 on t1.TrafficSource=t2.TrafficSource and t1.Division=t2.Division and t1.DatasourceName=t2.DatasourceName  and t1.Campaign=t2.Campaign --2022

;

Update M Set LeadSubsourceId =F.LeadSubsourceId, BranchID=F.BranchId, ProductID=F.ProductId,
			MappingInd= Case when (F.Division is not null and F.LeadsubsourceID is not null and F.BranchID is not null and F.ProductID is not null ) and 
								  (F.Division <>'' and F.LeadsubsourceID <>'' and F.BranchID <>'' and F.ProductID <>'') 
								then 'MAP' else 'UNMAP'
						end,
			LastUpdatedTS=getdate()
from EDW.[DIM_MKTNG_Campaign_Mapping_NoProductSpend] M  
join 
		(
		Select Distinct --CONVERT(VARCHAR(64), HashBytes('SHA2_256',TRIM(Upper(Concat(TrafficSource,Trim(DataSourceName),Campaign,LP_Market)))), 2) as Hashed_CampaignKey,
			F.TrafficSource, F.Account, F.DatasourceName, F.Campaign, F.LP_Market as Market, F.Division,
			F.LP_LeadsubsourceID  as LeadSubsourceId,
			F.LP_BranchID as BranchId,
			Coalesce(SP.ProductId, F.LP_ProductID) as ProductId,
			
		    case when F.TrafficSource='Google' and F.Division in ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI') and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%' then 
		        CONVERT(VARCHAR(64), HashBytes('SHA2_256',TRIM(Upper(Concat(F.TrafficSource,Trim(F.DataSourceName),F.Campaign,F.LP_Market,SP.ProductId)))), 2)
		        else CONVERT(VARCHAR(64), HashBytes('SHA2_256',TRIM(Upper(Concat(F.TrafficSource,Trim(F.DataSourceName),F.Campaign,F.LP_Market)))), 2) end as Hashed_CampaignKey

		FROM EDW.FACT_ad_performance_Metrics  F
	
		Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_SPEND_SPLIT SP
		on F.TrafficSource=SP.TrafficSource and F.DatasourceName=SP.DatasourceName and F.campaign=SP.campaign and F.LP_Market=SP.Market
		-- For brand campaigns to get the % and productIds
		
		Where F.Division<>'REN'
		) F  On  M.Hashed_CampaignKey=F.Hashed_CampaignKey
where M.MappingInd='UNMAP' ;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
With T_NoProduct_Spend_Split As (
	SELECT 
		Reporting_Division,
	    Division, 
	    case when Product ='Window/Door' then 'Wind/Doors' when Product='Coatings' then 'Garage' else Product end as Product, 
	    StaticPercentage
	FROM 
	    RDM.REF_MKTNG_NOPRODUCT_SPEND_SPLIT
	UNPIVOT (
	    StaticPercentage FOR Product IN ([Window/Door], Bath, Kitchen, Roof, Closet, Coatings)
	) AS unpvt
	where StaticPercentage<>'0%'
	--AND Division!='MXH'
),

NoProduct_Spend_Split As (
Select Division, Concat(case when Division='MXH' then 'FHI' else Division end,'-', cast(ProductId as varchar(32))) as ProductId, TX_Product_reporting, 
cast(Replace(StaticPercentage,'%','') as Int) StaticPercentage 
from (
	Select A.*, P.TX_Product_reporting , Max(Try_Cast(Substring(P.ProductId,5,len(P.ProductId)) as int)) as ProductId 
	from T_NoProduct_Spend_Split 
	A Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Product_mapping P on (Case when A.Division='MXH' then 'FHI' else A.Division end) =P.Division and A.Product = P.TX_Product_reporting 
	where P.TX_ProductGroup is not null 
	Group by 	
		Reporting_Division,
	    A.Division, 
	    Product, 
	    StaticPercentage,
		P.TX_Product_reporting
	)a
	
),

Product_Mapping as 
(
	SELECT Division,ProductID,EntryDate, Replace(case when Attribute ='TX_ProductGroup' then Substring(Value,1,4) else Value end,'wind','windows') as ProductName	FROM 
	   ( 
		SELECT 
		Division,ProductID,EntryDate,ProductName,ProductDescription, TX_ProductGroup ,TX_product_Reporting
	    FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Product_mapping
	    where Division not in ('HSI','PHI','MXH') 
		and TX_product_reporting  is NOT NULL 
		and TX_Product_Reporting<>'Gutters' 
		and ( ProductName  is NOT NULL and ProductDescription is NOT NULL) 
		and Year(EntryDate)<=Year(Getdate()) 
		and EntryDate is not null 
		and ACU_ProductID<>'000'
		
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		
		SELECT * FROM 
		(
		SELECT Division,ProductID,EntryDate,CASE WHEN ProductName LIKE '%WalkIn Tub%' THEN 'WIT' ELSE NULL END AS ProductName,ProductDescription, TX_ProductGroup ,TX_product_Reporting
				FROM EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Product_mapping
				where ( ProductName  is NOT NULL and ProductDescription is NOT NULL) 
				AND Year(EntryDate)<=Year(Getdate()) 
				AND EntryDate IS NOT NULL 
				AND ACU_ProductID<>'000'
				AND Division='SWR'
				AND ProductName LIKE '%Walk%'
				) M1
		WHERE ProductName IS NOT NULL
		
		
	   ) p 	UNPIVOT  ( Value FOR Attribute IN (ProductName, ProductDescription, TX_ProductGroup, TX_product_Reporting) )AS unpvt
),

Funnel_Campaigns as (
Select Distinct TrafficSource, case when F.Division='FHI' and (F.DataSourceName like '%Max%' or F.Campaign like '%MXH%' or F.Campaign like '%MAX%') then 'MXH' else F.Division end Division,
	F.DataSourceName,
	F.Campaign,
	Replace(Replace(F.DatasourceName,'Coat','Garage'),'Storage','Garage') as DatasourceName_Upd, 
	Replace(Replace(F.Campaign,'Coat','Garage'),'Storage','Garage')  as Campaign_upd
from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F where TrafficSource='Google' 
)
,

Update_Final As (
Select Trafficsource, case when Division='MXH' then 'FHI' else Division end as Division, DatasourceName,Campaign, ProductId, StaticPercentage, ProductReporting from (
	Select  * , 
	Row_number() over(Partition by TrafficSource,Division,DatasourceName,Campaign,StaticPercentage Order by EntryDate desc ,
		Cast(Rtrim(Substring(ProductId,5,Len(ProductId))) as Int) desc ) as Rownum 
	from (
			Select  TrafficSource, F.Division,F.DatasourceName, F.Campaign,
						Case when   ( F.Division in ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI','MXH') )  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%' 
					--  Case when   ( F.Division in ('MAC','SWR','RTW') or F.DataSourceName like '%Max%' or F.Campaign like '%MXH%' or F.Campaign like '%MAX%')  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%' 
							then cast(NP.ProductId as varchar(32)) else cast(Coalesce(P.ProductId,P1.ProductId) as varchar(32)) end as ProductID,

					  Case when   ( F.Division in  ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI','MXH') )  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%' 
							then NP.StaticPercentage else 100 end as StaticPercentage,

					  Case when   ( F.Division in  ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI','MXH') )  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%'
							then NP.TX_Product_reporting else Coalesce(P.Productname,P1.Productname) end as ProductReporting,

					  Coalesce(p.Entrydate,P1.Entrydate) as EntryDate
			from 
			Funnel_Campaigns F 	
			Left Join Product_Mapping p on  F.Division=P.Division and  F.Campaign_Upd like '%' + P.ProductName  + '%'
			Left Join Product_Mapping p1 on  F.Division=P1.Division  and  F.DatasourceName_Upd like '%' + P1.ProductName  + '%'
			Left join NoProduct_Spend_Split NP on F.Division=NP.Division
		 ) A 
 ) B
 where Rownum=1

)

Select a.* from (
	Select Distinct Concat(F.TrafficSource, F.DataSourceName, F.Campaign, F.LP_Market) as CampaignKey, F.TrafficSource,F.Division,
	F.Account,F.DatasourceName,F.campaign,F.LP_Market,
	A1.ProductId,A1.StaticPercentage,A1.ProductReporting,
	CONVERT(VARCHAR(64), HashBytes('SHA2_256',TRIM(Upper(Concat(F.TrafficSource,Trim(F.DataSourceName),F.Campaign,F.LP_Market,A1.ProductId)))), 2) as Hashed_CampaignKey
	from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS F Join Update_Final A1 on
	A1.TrafficSource=F.TrafficSource and A1.Division=F.Division and A1.DatasourceName=F.DatasourceName and  A1.Campaign=F.Campaign 
	
	
	Where F.TrafficSource='Google' and ( F.Division in ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI') ) and F.campaign  like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.campaign,' ','') not like '%Nonbrand%'
)a left join [EDW].[DIM_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_SPEND_SPLIT] b on a.Hashed_CampaignKey=b.Hashed_CampaignKey
where b.Hashed_CampaignKey is null

--Order by 3,4,6,7

With FACT_AD_Performance_Metrics As ( 
	Select Distinct 'Funnel' as Source,
	Concat(F.TrafficSource,Trim(F.DataSourceName),F.Campaign,F.LP_Market) as CampaignKey,
	F.TrafficSource, F.Account, F.DatasourceName, F.Campaign,F.LP_Market as Market, F.Division,
	
	Case 
		When F.Division='SWR' then 'B.Statewide' 
		When F.Division='RTW' then 'H.Northeast Division' 
		When F.Division='PBC' then 'G.West Division' 
		When F.Division='FHI' then 'A.East Division' 
		When F.Division='MAC' then 'C.Mad City' 
		When F.Division='CTA' then 'I.Home Org' 
		When F.Division='REN' then '0.Renuity'
	END  As Reporting_Division,
	
	F.LP_LeadsubsourceID  as LeadSubsourceId,
	F.LP_BranchID as BranchId,
	Coalesce(SP.ProductId, F.LP_ProductID) as ProductId,
	
	Case when (F.Division is not null and F.LP_LeadsubsourceID is not null and F.LP_BranchID is not null and F.LP_ProductID is not null ) and 
			  (F.Division <>'' and F.LP_LeadsubsourceID <>'' and F.LP_BranchID <>'' and F.LP_ProductID <>'')  then 'MAP' else 'UNMAP' end  AS MappingInd,
	
	Getdate() as CreatedTs,
	getdate() as LastUpdatedTs,
	'DataTeam' as CreatedBy,
	
	case when F.TrafficSource='Google' and  F.Division in ('MAC','SWR','RTW','FHI')  and F.Campaign like '%Brand%' and Replace(F.Campaign,' ','') not like '%NonBrand%' then 
		CONVERT(VARCHAR(64), HashBytes('SHA2_256',TRIM(Upper(Concat(F.TrafficSource,Trim(F.DataSourceName),F.Campaign,F.LP_Market,SP.ProductId)))), 2)
	else CONVERT(VARCHAR(64), HashBytes('SHA2_256',TRIM(Upper(Concat(F.TrafficSource,Trim(F.DataSourceName),F.Campaign,F.LP_Market)))), 2) end as Hashed_CampaignKey,
	
	Coalesce(SP.StaticPercentage,100) as StaticPercentage
	
	--CM.CampaignKey,
	--SP.Hashed_CampaignKey,
	--SP.StaticPercentage,
	--SP.ProductId

	FROM EDW.FACT_ad_performance_Metrics  F
	
	Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_SPEND_SPLIT SP
	on F.TrafficSource=SP.TrafficSource and F.DatasourceName=SP.DatasourceName and F.campaign=SP.campaign and F.LP_Market=SP.Market
	-- For brand campaigns to get the % and productIds
	
	where COALESCE(F.Account,'NA1') <> 'LSA - Mad City Windows - Madison Local Services'
)

Select F.*
From FACT_AD_Performance_Metrics F
Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_Campaign_Mapping_NoProductSpend CM  On F.Hashed_CampaignKey  = CM.Hashed_CampaignKey
 --For Incremental load

where CM.CampaignKey is NULL

--Order by 3,4,6,7
--Select * from 
--TEMP.DIM_MKTNG_CAMPAIGN_SPEND_SPLIT_1 
----Order by 3,4,6,7

activities.name: Fact_Summ_AD_Performance_Metrics
activities.description: Create test version and get approval for FHI, swr, mxh

source.sqlReaderQuery:
With AD_Performance As (
	Select 
	Concat(TrafficSource,Replace(DataSourceName,'Statewide Bath - Swish ','Statewide Bath - Swish'), Campaign,LP_market) as CampaignKey,
	Cast(PerformanceDate as Date) as PerformanceDate, TrafficSource, Account, DatasourceName, Campaign, Adgroup, Ad, 
	CampaignId, AdgroupId, AdId,
	Market, LP_Market, Division,
	LP_LeadsubsourceId,
	Sum(cost) As Cost, 
	Sum(Clicks) as Clicks,
	Sum(Impressions) as Impressions, 
	Sum(Conversions) as Conversions
	from EDW.FACT_AD_Performance_Metrics
	
	where cast(LastUpdateTS as date) >= cast(Dateadd(D, -1, Getdate()) as date) -- refreshing the data which has updated in last 7 days
	 
	Group by 
	Concat(TrafficSource,DataSourceName, Campaign,LP_market) ,
	Cast(PerformanceDate as Date), TrafficSource, Account, DatasourceName, Campaign, Adgroup, Ad, 
	CampaignId, AdgroupId, AdId,
	Market, LP_Market, Division,LP_LeadsubsourceId
)

--Select Eomonth(PerformanceDate), DataSourceName,Campaign,LeadSubsourceId, Sum(Cost), sum(Adjusted_Cost), sum(Adjusted_Cost+AgencyFee_Cal)  from (
Select 
F.CampaignKey,F.PerformanceDate, F.TrafficSource, F.Account, F.DatasourceName, F.Campaign, F.Adgroup, F.Ad, 
F.CampaignId, F.AdgroupId, F.AdId,
F.Market, F.LP_Market, F.Division,
F.LP_LeadsubsourceId,F.Cost, F.Clicks, F.Impressions, F.Conversions,

CM.Reporting_Division, 
Case when F.DatasourceName in ('Statewide Bath - Swish' ,'Statewide Windows - Swish' ,'FHIA Windows - Swish') 
	then F.LP_leadsubsourceId
	else CM.LeadSubsourceId end as LeadSubsourceId, 
CM.BranchId, CM.ProductId as ProductId,

case when SM.AgencyVendorName like '%swish%' and Cast(F.Performancedate as date)<='2025-12-31' then 0.12 else SM.AgencyFee end as AgencyFee_Percentage ,
--SM.LP_subsource, SM.AgencyFee, SM.AgencyVendorName, SM.ACU_AgencyVendorID,
F.Cost * Cast((Coalesce(CM.StaticPercentage,100)/100.0) as float) * (case when SM.AgencyVendorName like '%swish%' and Cast(F.Performancedate as date)<='2025-12-31' then 0.12 else SM.AgencyFee end)  As AgencyFee,

Coalesce(CM.StaticPercentage,100) as StaticPercentage, CM.MappingInd,

F.Cost * Cast((Coalesce(CM.StaticPercentage,100)/100.0) as float) As Adjusted_Cost,
F.Clicks * Cast((Coalesce(CM.StaticPercentage,100)/100.0) as float) As Adjusted_Clicks,
F.Impressions * Cast((Coalesce(CM.StaticPercentage,100)/100.0) as float) As Adjusted_Impressions,
F.Conversions * Cast((Coalesce(CM.StaticPercentage,100)/100.0) as float) As Adjusted_Conversions


from AD_Performance F 

Left join EDW.[DIM_MKTNG_Campaign_Mapping_NoProductSpend] CM on F.CampaignKey=CM.CampaignKey
Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_sub_source_mapping SM on 
						Case when F.DatasourceName in ('Statewide Bath - Swish' ,'Statewide Windows - Swish' ,'FHIA Windows - Swish') 
	 						 then F.LP_leadsubsourceId
	 						 else CM.LeadSubsourceId end = SM.LeadSubsourceId

--)a Group by Eomonth(PerformanceDate), DataSourceName,Campaign,LeadSubsourceId
--Order by 2,1 desc, 3

sink.preCopyScript:
Delete  T1
--Select Distinct T1.TrafficSource, Eomonth(T1.PerformanceDate) 
from EDW.FACT_SUMM_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS T1
 join 
(
	Select S.TrafficSource,S.PerformanceDate from 
	(Select Distinct  TrafficSource,PerformanceDate, CampaignKey from EDW.FACT_SUMM_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS 
	  ) S
	Left join 
	(Select Distinct  TrafficSource,cast(PERFORMANCEDATE as date) as PerformanceDate, Concat(TrafficSource,DatasourceName,Campaign,LP_Market)as CampaignKey
	from EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS 
	Where cast(LastUpdateTs as date)>= cast(Dateadd(D,-1,Getdate()) as date)
         ) F 
	On S.PerformanceDate=F.PerformanceDate and S.CampaignKey =F.CampaignKey
	Where F.TrafficSource is not null and F.PerformanceDate is not null --Order by 1,2
	
)T2  on T1.TrafficSource=T2.Trafficsource and T1.PerformanceDate =T2.PerformanceDate

activities.name: Update LP Market Temp Nextdoor
activities.description: Update Product ID for Google Traffic Sources campaigns

scripts.text:
UPDATE EDW.FACT_AD_PERFORMANCE_METRICS 
SET LP_BranchID=CONCAT(Division,'-'),
LP_Market='zNo Market'
WHERE TrafficSource='Nextdoor'
